text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and I are walking through the park
when she comes to a sudden stop and becomes
transfixed by a lady looking out over the water.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...! Is that? No, it can't be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, pardon me. There's simply no way that—but
then again, the resemblance is so uncanny...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...It must be her. That lady is a stage actress I saw perform in my youth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I believe she has yet to retire... I remember
watching her and being mesmerized by her stage
presence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To think I'd see her here of all places... What a
peculiar feeling. It's as if I'm reliving my
childhood.
choice_data_list: Why don't you go say hi?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... it would be dreadfully rude to strike up
a conversation with her out of the blue. Especially
considering she's off the clock at the moment...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Are you... certain? I would be as polite and respectful as possible, of course...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. I shall allow myself to become a child
once again... and relive my memories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's rare for Mejiro Ardan to look this giddy.
Watching her talk with the stage actress from a
distance, I can't help but smile.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for your patience, Trainer. I had a
wonderful time—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? Is something the matter? You have quite
a bewildered look in your eye...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh?! G-Goodness, what am I doing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Whew... I don't know what came over me...
choice_data_list: Is it because you let yourself be a child again?
Is it because you let yourself be a child again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Th-that can't be right... I was never the sort of
child to express my excitement physically.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Unless, no, surely not... Was that spontaneous
movement just now the first time I've done it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's taken me by surprise as well. To think that my
body would move on its own like that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Still... perplexing movements aside, it appears
that reviving distant memories is a wonderful
thing indeed.
choice_data_list:
...It's nice to let your inner child out sometimes,
isn't it?

...It's nice to let your inner child out sometimes,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It is. Back then, I'd watch these worlds unfolding
up on the stage and feel my heart pounding with
excitement...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Trainer, please refrain from teasing me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a child anymore. It's no use indulging in
such juvenile whims.
choice_data_list: Or you could just go ahead and have some fun.
Nostalgia's something you can enjoy because you've matured.
Nostalgia's something you can enjoy because you've matured.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a child anymore. It's no use indulging in
such juvenile whims.
choice_data_list: Or you could just go ahead and have some fun.
Nostalgia's something you can enjoy because you've matured.
Nostalgia's something you can enjoy because you've matured.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Have some fun... Actually, in that sense, I think it
would be all right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...But if I were to have some fun, I think I'd be
more comfortable doing so with some company.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... If you're willing to accompany me,
Trainer, I believe I'll have myself some fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. You're really quite good at skipping,
Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us relax by letting our inner doofuses
out for a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I can see the logic in that.
choice_data_list:
It shows that you've come out of your shell, so
to speak.

It shows that you've come out of your shell, so
to speak.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. When put in those terms, this sort of
behavior does indicate a love for—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, this really is rather embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I come to discover a side to Mejiro Ardan
that takes me by surprise—and it's one she wasn't
aware of herself either.
